category_sources: Official Couchbase docs describe the Couchbase C SDK, libcouchbase, as enabling C language interaction with Couchbase Server.
source_facts.description says it is a C library for Couchbase.
display_name_sources: Official Couchbase docs refer to libcouchbase as the C SDK library.
docs_sources: Official Couchbase API documentation introduces the Couchbase C Client.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Couchbase C SDK getting-started documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository couchbase/libcouchbase identifies itself as the Couchbase C Client and shows clone instructions.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official Couchbase docs describe the C SDK/libcouchbase for interacting with Couchbase Server.
source_facts.description identifies a Couchbase C library and source_facts.executables lists cbc tools.
